figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of the Geo-Expert framework. The pipeline consists of three main stages: (1) extracting and sanitizing text from canonical geology textbooks; (2) synthesizing high-quality, CoT-enhanced instruction pairs via a domain-structured generation pipeline; (3) applying parameter-efficient fine-tuning on base LLMs.

Table 1. Performance comparison of various models on the Geo-Eval Benchmark. The best results in each column are highlighted in bold, and the second-best are underlined. The ∆ column indicates the absolute performance gain achieved by our Geo-Expert fine-tuning framework compared to the respective base model. ∗∗∗ indicates statistical significance (p = 3.7121× 10−106 < 0.001) compared to the corresponding base models via paired t-test.
Table 3. Hyperparameter configurations for fine-tuning the Geo-Expert model family.
